shakshi: Vajil met — the Dryad expert on Demigods, in the Woods of Mercurie
Vajil taught the player who the Demigods are — the knowledge that precedes the relationship
Shapieru known — Shaper of Cultures, Demigod, available as late game companion
Lanzu known — son of Lakota and Zukoru, divine knowledge and demonic betrayal in one nature, available as late game companion
Tagame known — Demigoddess of Life, daughter of Negaya and Lakota, Kore's lover, available as late game companion
The Demigods can now take up residence with the player — knowledge preceded relationship, trust is possible
